results.rendered_html:
atarkita a. Unthought of, unexpected; samameva gatosyatarkitāṃ gatimaṃgena ca jīvitena ca.  Ku. 4. 22 ;  Bh. 3. 137 ; ˚gamanena  Mu. 4. 
— taṃ adv. Unexpectedly.
Comp.
— āgata, -upanata a. occuring or befalling unexpectedly, quite accidental, sudden; ˚darśanollāsitalocanayā anayā  Māl. 3 ; ˚upapannaṃ darśanaṃ  Ku. 6. 54.
